content.en:
Gui Lao's strength is not strong, and he doesn't know many secret things.

Ye Tian asked many questions, and finally asked about Gui Lao's origin.

"Gui Lao, what force is behind you?"

Ye Tian asked.

Gui Lao hesitated for a moment, but thinking that his life was still in Ye Tian's hands, he dared not not answer.

He had to reply: "Senior, I belong to Yuanmeng!"

"Yuanmeng? What kind of force is this?"

Ye Tian frowned slightly. There was no Yuanmeng in the forces on Wanchong Mountain.

Gui Lao had to introduce: "Yuanmeng is the top force in the Mist Region."

The Mist Region is one of the thirty-six realms of this time and space line, and Wanchong Mountain is one of the territories of the Mist Region. The reason why it is called the Fog Domain is that this domain is shrouded in strange gray fog. Without the strength of the Ultimate "Six Six Zero Three Zero Three" Palace Master, it is impossible to leave, otherwise it will be wiped out by the gray fog.

Under the introduction of Ghost Old, he also knew the strength of Yuanmeng. In fact, it is not as good as Leiyu Palace, with only one Ultimate Palace Master, but there are more practitioners above the 30th Heaven, and the sphere of influence is very wide, but the main business scope is not Wanzhong Mountain.

Yuanmeng has only one branch in Wanzhong Mountain, but even if it is a branch, it should not be underestimated.

"Remember, I didn't come to you!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he disappeared.

He didn't kill Ghost Old. There was no point in killing him. On the contrary, if he needed intelligence in the future, he might be able to use the power of Ghost Old or Yuanmeng.

If he killed Ghost Old, he would undoubtedly offend the Yuanmeng behind Ghost Old, which would not be worthwhile.

After Ye Tian left, Gui Lao was also relieved. He really thought that he would be killed with a high probability, but he didn't expect that Ye Tian didn't kill him.

...

"There are still many strong people on the Wanchong Mountain side, and there are even more strong people in the Mist Region. There is definitely an eternal ultimate palace master."

Ye Tian understood these situations, at least he was no longer confused about this time and space line.

In addition, he also learned from Gui Lao that the secret recipe of the high-level Chonggong Jindan would not be taken out by Yuanmeng, and almost no forces were willing to take it out. It was almost impossible to obtain it in a normal way.

Even if he joined some forces now, he would not be recognized without serving for a long time.

After all, the materials that can refine the high-level Chonggong Jindan are rare, and there are not too few secret masters who can refine the high-level Chonggong Jindan. They themselves lack materials, so how can they train new high-level Chonggong Jindan secret masters!

So, no matter how high his level is, it is difficult to get recognition.

However, Gui Lao still provided him with a place - Wuge Auction.

Wuge Auction will be held every once in a while, with all kinds of treasures and high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipes.

Wuge is the most mysterious force in Wuyu, with many ultimate palace masters, far superior to Leiyu Palace and Yuanmeng.

Of course, if you want to bid for a highThe price of the high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe is not low, and it requires a lot of top-grade secret crystals.

Ye Tian now needs to earn a lot of top-grade secret crystals to participate in the Wuge auction, otherwise it will be difficult to obtain the high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to refine the intermediate Chonggong Jindan, but the purity was more than 98%, mixed with a small amount of 100% purity intermediate Chonggong Jindan, so it would not cause too much waves.

In this way, Ye Tian's accumulated wealth became more and more abundant.

Finally, he collected 30 million top-grade spirit crystals, which was enough to exchange for the high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe, because the last time the high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe was only sold for more than 10 million top-grade spirit crystals.

So, he will definitely be able to compete for it, but it depends on whether the Wuge auction will auction the high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe this time.

Soon, the Wuge auction will begin.

Ye Tian came to the venue of the Wuge auction - Taigu Leidu. After showing his wealth and cultivation, he easily got an admission.

Anyway, Wuge doesn't care about the identity of the participants in the auction. As long as there are enough top-grade spirit crystals, you can participate.

In the following days, Ye Tian stayed in Taigu Leidu, waiting for the auction to start.

This day.

The auction started.

Ye Tian came to the auction and sensed many powerful practitioners, including many powerful people above the 30th level. It can be seen how many powerful people this auction attracted...

A practitioner like him in the 30th level is very inconspicuous, and no one will care about his identity...

This is also a good thing for him.

Soon after, the auction began. The auctioneer of this auction was Bai Yi, a powerful person in the 35th level of Wuge.

Strong men like Bai Yi are very famous in Wanchong Mountain, but he is just an ordinary member in Wuge.

"Everyone, Wuge's auction is now officially open, and the first auction item is a supreme-level Chonggong technique!"

Bai Yi said.

The supreme-level Chonggong technique is indeed very good, but it is meaningless to many practitioners, who also practice the supreme-level Chonggong technique.

However, there are very few practitioners who only practice the emperor-level Chonggong technique, and they are still eager for the supreme-level Chonggong technique.

So, the few practitioners here began to bid frantically, all wanting to bid for this supreme-level Chonggong technique.

Afterwards, some supreme-level Chonggong secrets were also auctioned, as well as some special weapons and treasures.

But currently, the practitioners who participated in the auction are all below the 30th Heaven, and the real good things have not yet come out. The practitioners above the 30th Heaven are not interested in participating in the auction.

"The next item to be auctioned is the high-level Chonggong Jindan - Wuji Pojie Dan, which has a purity of 89%. It can help practitioners below 2.2 in the 33rd Heaven to break free from their shackles and break through their realm. The starting price for 2.2 is 10,000 top-grade secret crystals!"

This treasure has attracted many practitioners, and even a practitioner from the 35th Heaven has participated in the auction. They may not need this Wuji Pojie Pill, but their descendants do!

Wuji Pojie Pill is a very special high-level Chonggong Jindan. The material is extremely rare and rarely appears. They naturally don't want to give up when they encounter it.

Ye Tian has no interest in such a high-level Chonggong Jindan. He is only interested in the secret recipe of the high-level Chonggong Jindan.

Soon, this Wuji Pojie Pill was auctioned off by a practitioner from the 35th Heaven at a high price of 32,000 top-grade secret crystals.

Unconsciously, a large number of treasures were auctioned, including Chonggong Zhibao, which can greatly improve the combat power of practitioners. .
